## 💰 Minimum Cost for a 3-Day Trip

Using **Montmartre Suites** ($110/night), **Paris Rent-a-Car** ($45/day), and **Miznon** ($15/meal x 2 meals/day):

| Item | Calculation | Cost |
|-----|------------|------|
| 🏨 Hotel (3 nights) | $110 × 3 | **$330** |
| 🚗 Car Rental (3 days) | $45 × 3 | **$135** |
| 🍽️ Restaurant (2 meals/day × 3 days) | $15 × 6 | **$90** |
| **💵 TOTAL MINIMUM** | | **$555** |

|-----|------|

| 🚗 Car Rental (3 days) | $135 |
| 🍽️ Restaurant (6 meals) | $120 |
| **💵 TOTAL** | **$585** |
